highlights.text: I wrote last Tuesday at 4pm: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
We saw that yesterday, and it propelled today’s run I wrote at 4pm Monday “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “My general lean is to defer to the trend..Fill this out more then work to 6360, 6366, then 6371-74.
This newsletter is devoted to those building blocks, but the most fundamental of all is my core setup, the Failed Breakdown.
As long as the triangle support holds (or failed breakdown and quick recover), ES can work back up the structure with 6301 being 1st target.
We trapped to the downside to 6241, Failed Breakdown to trap bears, then rallied to 6333.

Same drill here, if its a controlled sell one can long it, but a far better entry is the Failed Breakdown of Friday’s 6323 low and this is a good entry.” Yesterday, we flushed Friday’s low, trapped shorts, and were off.
In todays newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into a simple Failed Breakdown we had last Friday, that triggered us from 6320s to 6370s Monday high (this was provided in advance).
I’ll also discuss Tuesday’s Failed Breakdown mentioned above.

post_title: Parabolic Breakout From The Two Week Triangle Continues In SPX. How Much More In The Tank? July 24 Plan
